2026/05/15 19:28:47.543232467 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543236664 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543282510 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543283672 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543303900 {
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543304952 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543317826 new <- list()
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543318888 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543331832 new$width <- width
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543332714 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543345237 new$height <- height
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543345658 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543354404 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543354865 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543372187 new$title <- title
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543373049 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543385823 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543388207 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543397254 new$version <- version
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543397695 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543412793 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543413685 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543430025 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543430847 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543440077 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543452046 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543452928 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543465812 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543466673 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543480840 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543481341 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543498012 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543498473 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543507961 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543508361 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543517979 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543518390 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543527527 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543527928 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543537315 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543537726 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543546723 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543547174 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543571249 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543572421 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543587311 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543598620 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543599541 "default"))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543615253 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543617768 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543638737 }
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543639759 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543650139 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543651030 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543660438 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543660908 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543670647 }
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543671078 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543679243 }
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543679663 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543687709 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543688139 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543752890 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543755605 domain = NA)
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543773949 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543774991 }
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543789268 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543790109 old$family <- family
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543812511 }
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543813503 version <- old$version
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543827159 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543828080 "2.0")
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543845132 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543846224 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543883013 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543884065 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543900405 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543901377 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543920052 domain = NA)
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543920924 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543939308 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543940069 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543961229 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543962080 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543983230 invisible()
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543984162 }

2026/05/15 19:28:47.543232467 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543236664 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543282510 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543283672 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543303900 {
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543304952 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543317826 new <- list()
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543318888 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543331832 new$width <- width
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543332714 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543345237 new$height <- height
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543345658 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543354404 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543354865 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543372187 new$title <- title
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543373049 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543385823 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543388207 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543397254 new$version <- version
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543397695 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543412793 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543413685 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543430025 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543430847 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543440077 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543452046 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543452928 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543465812 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543466673 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543480840 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543481341 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543498012 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543498473 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543507961 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543508361 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543517979 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543518390 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543527527 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543527928 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543537315 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543537726 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543546723 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543547174 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543571249 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543572421 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543587311 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543598620 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543599541 "default"))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543615253 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543617768 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543638737 }
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543639759 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543650139 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543651030 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543660438 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543660908 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543670647 }
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543671078 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543679243 }
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543679663 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543687709 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543688139 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543752890 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543755605 domain = NA)
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543773949 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543774991 }
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543789268 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543790109 old$family <- family
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543812511 }
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543813503 version <- old$version
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543827159 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543828080 "2.0")
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543845132 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543846224 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543883013 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543884065 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543900405 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543901377 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543920052 domain = NA)
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543920924 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543939308 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543940069 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543961229 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543962080 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543983230 invisible()
2026/05/15 19:28:47.543984162 }
